name: lrd_mbh_mstar_prediction
conclusion: Differential Temporal Shear predicts M_BH/M_* boosts of 2e+77–1e+304 for LRD-mass halos at z=4–10. This is consistent with JWST observations of overmassive black holes (Pacucci et al. 2024; Maiolino et al. 2024) without requiring super-Eddington accretion or exotic heavy seeds.
